products.title: Voltas 243V Vectra CAJ 2 Ton 3 Star Inverter Split AC

availability.delivery: Delivery availability restricted for selected location (Chennai)

products.short_description: Voltas 2 Ton 3 Star Inverter Split AC with 4-in-1 adjustable cooling, copper condenser, and high ambient cooling up to 52°C.
products.long_description: The Voltas 243V Vectra CAJ 2 Ton 3 Star Inverter Split AC is designed for large rooms (around 211–230 sq.ft) and delivers efficient cooling even in extreme temperatures up to 52°C. It features a 4-in-1 adjustable cooling mode, allowing users to control cooling capacity based on requirement. The inverter compressor improves energy efficiency by adjusting speed dynamically. Built with a copper condenser for better heat transfer and durability, it also includes anti-dust and anti-microbial filters for improved air quality. Additional features include sleep mode, hidden display, anti-freeze thermostat, wide voltage operation, and self-diagnosis.
highlights: 2 Ton capacity suitable for large rooms
Cools efficiently up to 52°C ambient temperature
pros: Good cooling performance for large rooms
Good build quality with copper condenser
cons: Installation experience varies by service partner
